item.title: Eradication of Invasive Ferrets Within N. Ireland’s Largest Seabird Colony Is a World First
item.description: In a world-first conservation achievement, Northern Ireland has successfully eradicated an invasive population of ferrets on Rathlin Island, host of t...

item.title: Turkey Saves its Bald Ibis ‘the Herald of Spring’ from Extinction Thanks to Semi-Wild Breeding

item.title: Millions of Americans May Now Also Be Considered Canadians Under a New Law
item.description: Millions of Americans who have a Canadian parent, grandparent, or even a great-grandparent, will be eligible to apply for citizenship under a new law....

item.title: Fossil From 289M Years Ago Reveals ‘Mummified’ Skin, Scales, Proteins–And Earliest Known Lung Function

item.title: Good News in History, April 24
item.description: On this day 37 years ago, the famed Hubble Space Telescope was launched into low Earth orbit by the Space Shuttle Discovery. Built by NASA with help f...
